feedback_comment: Excellent course. The way Dr. Menon explains recursion and trees is very clear. Assignments were challenging but worth it.
Really enjoyed the hands-on projects. Would have liked more coverage of deep learning topics.
Best course I have taken this semester. Project-based learning approach worked really well for me.
Course content was good but the exam pattern was not aligned with what was taught in class.
Tough course but Dr. Menon is very supportive. Office hours were extremely helpful.
The assignments on regression and classification were very practical and industry relevant.
Good introduction to React. Wished the course covered Next.js and backend integration too.
Lectures moved too fast. Slides were not sufficient to study from. Need more practice problems.
One of the best DSA courses available. Competitive programming problems at the end were great.
Decent course. The math prerequisites were not clearly communicated at the start of semester.
Loved every lecture. The final project of building a full portfolio site was very satisfying.
Challenging but rewarding. SQL query optimization section was particularly eye opening.
Content is good but the pace was too fast for beginners. More beginner friendly examples needed.
Absolutely loved this course. The Kaggle competition at the end was a fantastic practical experience.
Very practical course. The component architecture concepts will be directly useful in internships.
Theory is fine but lab sessions needed better infrastructure. Servers kept going down during practicals.
Very well structured course. The week by week progression from arrays to graphs was logical.
Good course overall. Would appreciate recorded lectures for revision before exams.
Good for beginners but advanced students may find it slow. Could use more advanced projects.
Initially struggled but by the end it all clicked. Professor Rao is very knowledgeable and helpful.
